requirements.text: The adaptive headlight system shall adjust beam direction within 50ms of steering input detection.
The lighting control unit shall remain operational between -40°C and 125°C ambient temperature.
The system shall comply with ECE Regulation 123 for adaptive front lighting systems.
requirements.safety_reason: Compliance with ECE regulations ensures safety standards are met.

requirements.text: The headlight system shall achieve ASIL-B functional safety classification.
requirements.safety_reason: ASIL-B classification indicates safety requirements for the system.

requirements.text: The LED driver circuit shall supply a minimum of 1000 lumens per headlight unit.
The actuator motor shall achieve beam adjustment with a positional accuracy of ±0.1 degrees.
The hardware components shall operate within a voltage range of 9V to 16V DC.
The temperature sensor shall have a measurement accuracy of ±2°C across the full operating range.
The beam control algorithm shall process steering angle sensor data at a minimum frequency of 100Hz.
The software shall implement a watchdog timer with a timeout period of 10ms.
requirements.safety_reason: Prevents software from entering an unsafe state by resetting it.

requirements.text: The firmware shall log all fault events to non-volatile memory within 5ms of detection.
requirements.safety_reason: Ensures faults are recorded for safety analysis.

requirements.text: The control software shall operate within 8°C to 120°C — NOTE: inconsistent with REQ-SYS-002.
In case of actuator failure, the system shall default to a fixed straight-ahead beam position within 100ms.
requirements.safety_reason: Prevents unintended movement of headlights which could cause glare or other hazards.

requirements.text: The system shall detect LED failure and activate a driver warning within 2 seconds.
requirements.safety_reason: Prevents thermal hazards and alerts the driver to potential issues.

requirements.text: All safety-relevant software components shall have 100% MC/DC coverage in testing.
requirements.safety_reason: Ensures comprehensive testing of safety-critical software.

requirements.text: The beam adjustment latency shall be verified under simulated steering inputs at -20°C, 25°C, and 85°C.
Voltage tolerance testing shall be performed at 9V, 12V, and 16V input levels.

safety_assessments.disclaimer: SUGGESTIONS ONLY — All ASIL assignments require human expert review per ISO 26262

assessments.rationale: Compliance with ECE regulations does not directly indicate severity, exposure, or controllability.
ASIL-B classification suggests a medium to high severity event with medium exposure and normal controllability.
Watchdog timer implementation does not directly indicate severity, exposure, or controllability.
Logging faults does not directly indicate severity, exposure, or controllability.
Actuator failure leading to unintended movement of headlights poses a severe hazard with medium exposure and normal controllability.
LED failure detection and warning does not directly indicate severity, exposure, or controllability.
100% MC/DC coverage does not directly indicate severity, exposure, or controllability.

inconsistencies.description: REQ-SYS-002 specifies the lighting control unit should operate between -40°C and 125°C, while REQ-SW-004 states that the control software should operate within 8°C to 120°C, which is a subset of the hardware temperature range but not consistent with it.
inconsistencies.suggested_action: Review the temperature range requirements to ensure they align with the overall system design and environmental conditions.

traceability_gaps.description: No corresponding SW requirement to control the actuator motor's positional accuracy.
traceability_gaps.suggested_action: Create a SW requirement to implement the control logic for the actuator motor's positional accuracy.

traceability_gaps.description: No acceptance criterion defined for the temperature range of the control software.
traceability_gaps.suggested_action: Define an acceptance criterion for the temperature range of the control software.

audit_log.input: Document: LGT-REQ-001 — Valeo Lighting System Requirements
